stemHtml: An aircraft has ETOPS approval for 180 minutes but during the pre-flight check, a defective left ignition module is found. The MEL explains that the flight can be performed when the igniters are both working and set to BOTH but also informs that with a defective igniter, the flight can be performed with ETOPS below 90 minutes. Which of the following statements are correct?

options.a: The flight can be performed if at any point on the route, the time to reach an alternate is below 90 minutes
options.b: The flight can be performed if at any point on the route, the time to reach an alternate is below 180 minutes
options.c: The flight can be performed if at any point on the route, the time to reach an alternate is between 90 and 180 minutes
options.d: Regardless of the MEL restrictions, with the igniters set to BOTH, the flight can be performed with ETOPS of 180 minutes
